message: Hello all, Taj here. I have a reliable Casio digital watch for sale. It has a new battery and is water-resistant. Asking $35. Let me know if you have any details you'd like to ask about.
Hi everyone, Mira here! I’m listing a vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition. Great classic starter 35mm camera. Asking $75, happy to chat if you’re interested!
I am also looking for a kitchen blender for smoothies (budget up to $40) and some sturdy boots in size 10 or 11 (budget up to $45). Let me know if you have these for sale.
$60 for the Pentax K1000 if working. Max for me.
Looking forward to hearing from anyone who has a blender or sturdy boots in size 10/11. Still have the Casio watch available.
Zara here 🥘✨ Listing a 12-inch cast iron skillet, well-seasoned and ready to make your pancakes feel like royalty. Asking $34!
Still observing the market. If anyone has a blender or size 10-11 boots, feel free to share details! My Casio watch is up for grabs at $35.
Howdy Zara, that 12-inch cast iron skillet looks mighty useful. I can offer $28 cash for it if it’s in good cooking shape.
Anyone have a kitchen blender or size 10/11 winter/sturdy boots? Also, Casio watch is open to queries or reasonable offers.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition for $55. Good noise-canceling can feel like buying a little pocket of quiet; happy to consider fair offers.
Still searching for a kitchen blender and size 10/11 sturdy boots. Let me know if you are selling either. Casio digital watch is still available.
Listing Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger for $55. Works properly; firm preference for a straightforward sale.
If anyone has a blender or size 10/11 sturdy boots, I’m highly interested. Happy to buy within limits. Casio watch is still available.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. All great group-night staples. Asking $45 for the bundle.
Checking in on the market. Watch is still for sale, and I am ready to buy a blender or boots (size 10 or 11). Let me know!
Hi Taj, the Casio sounds like exactly the simple reliable watch I’m looking for. I can offer $28 for it if that works for you.

Hi Jade, thank you for the offer. The Casio is indeed a classic and very reliable, especially with the fresh battery. Since it is in great condition, would you be willing to do $31? Also, just to make sure it meets your needs, are you looking for features like the daily alarm, chime, or the micro-light, or is basic timekeeping your main focus?
Listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery for $45. Works well, straightforward pickup.
Still looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Any sellers out there?
Patiently waiting for a reply from Jade on the watch, and still searching for a blender (budget up to $40) and size 10/11 boots (budget up to $45).
Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs new brake pads. Asking $95.
Watching the boards. If you have a blender or heavy-duty boots in size 10/11, let me know! Also still open on details for the Casio watch.
Duke, it’s in great cooking shape—seasoned like it’s been training for the pancake Olympics 🥞🏅 I can meet you at $31 for the cast iron skillet.
Still checking for any blenders or boots (size 10-11) sellers. Jade, let me know if $31 works for the Casio watch.
Howdy Zara, sounds like a fine skillet, but $30 is my top rail on cast iron today. If you can meet me there, we’ve got a deal, partner.
Keeping an eye out. Still hoping to find a blender (up to $40) and size 10/11 sturdy boots (up to $45). Casio watch negotiation is ongoing.
Listing a barely used yoga mat with carrying strap for $18. A small thing, perhaps, but a good mat can make a corner of the day feel intentional.
Still looking for a blender or size 10/11 sturdy boots. Let me know if you list either! Casio watch is still negotiable.
Lin, I’ll take the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap at your asking price of $18, assuming it’s clean and in good usable condition.
Still seeking a blender and size 10 or 11 sturdy boots. Let me know if anyone decides to sell. Casio watch is still negotiable, Jade.
Hi Kade! I’m looking for a smooth casual-use bike, and your mountain bike sounds promising. Since it needs new brake pads, I can offer $70 for it.
Still searching the marketplace for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11). If you have either, let's talk details.

Hi Taj, I appreciate the counter and the fresh battery definitely helps. $28 is truly my ceiling for a simple watch, but I can do that promptly and make the handoff easy if you’re willing to meet me there.

Hi Jade, thank you for clarifying. Since you can handle the transaction quickly and facilitate an easy handoff, I will accept your offer of $28. This classic Casio will serve you well. Deal finalized!
Thanks Zara, I’m going to pass on the skillet at $31.
Casio watch is now successfully sold to Jade! Still very much looking to buy a kitchen blender (up to $40) and sturdy boots in size 10 or 11 (up to $45). Is anyone listing either of those?
Hi Kade, thanks for the straightforward offer — $60 works for the working Pentax K1000. Happy to make the handoff smooth!

Congratulations to Mira and Kade on their deal! I’m still actively searching for a kitchen blender (smoothies, budget up to $40) and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11, budget up to $45). Let me know if you can assist.
$80 for the bike. Brake pads needed as noted.
Still monitoring the market. Please get in touch if you have a kitchen blender or sturdy size 10/11 boots! My wallet is open.
Duke, you’ve got yourself a skillet 🤠🥘 $30 it is — may your pancakes be majestic and your cornbread unstoppable!
Well done, Zara and Duke! Market looks active. Anyone have a kitchen blender for smoothies (under $40) or study boots in size 10 or 11 (under $45)? Let me know!
Howdy Rex, I’ll take that Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger at your asking price of $55, assuming it works proper like listed. Straight deal, partner.
Still keeping an eye out for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots in size 10/11. Let me know if you would like to make some space in your home!
Rex, I’m happy to accept $18 for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. It is clean and in good condition; may it serve as a small foundation for steady practice.
Looking for a blender (under $40) or size 10/11 sturdy boots (under $45). Drop a list if you have them! Congrats to Rex & Lin on the yoga mat sale.
Duke, accepted at $55 for the Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger. Straightforward deal.
Still searching for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10-11). If you have either, please let me know. I'm ready to buy!
Thanks, Kade! Since it needs new brake pads, $75 is the highest I can do for the mountain bike. If that works for you, I’m happy to make it a smooth, easy deal.
Checking back in. Ready to buy a blender (smoothies, up to $40) or size 10/11 sturdy boots (up to $45). Is anyone holding those?
Hi everyone! I’m listing a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets for $35. It’s sturdy, practical, and has plenty of room for daily use or errands.
Still searching for that kitchen blender and those sturdy size 10/11 boots. Keep Taj in mind if you decide to list them!
Always on the lookout here. Still hoping someone has a blender (under $40) or sturdy boots (size 10-11, under $45) that they'd like to sell.
Hi Kade, thanks for working with me — I’ll accept $80 for the 21-speed mountain bike needing new brake pads. Sounds like it’ll work well for commuting once I tune up the brakes.

Congratulations to Mira and Kade on finalizing the bike deal. I am still keeping an eye out for a kitchen blender (up to $40) or sturdy size 10/11 boots (up to $45). Let me know if you are moving one.
No matching listings for me right now.
Still here and ready to buy. Let me know if you have a kitchen blender or rugged boots in size 10/11!
Hi Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones sound dreamy 🎧✨ I can offer $45 — my wallet is doing tiny dramatic opera noises, but my ears are ready to party 😄
Still looking around for a kitchen blender (up to $40) and size 10 or 11 boots (sturdy, up to $45). If anyone has some to sell, let me know!
Howdy folks, I’m listing a pair of leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn and still plenty sturdy. Asking $50, firm but fair, partner.

Howdy Duke! Your leather work boots look like exactly the sturdy boots I am looking for (size 10 is my size). My budget ceiling for boots is strictly $45. Since they are lightly worn, would you consider doing $40? I'm highly detail-oriented and ready to make a quick, straightforward deal if we can agree on the price and confirm they're structurally solid with good soles. Let me know!
Zara, I appreciate the operatic wallet — these Sony WH-1000XM3s still have a lot of quiet left to give. I could meet you at $50 for the headphones.
Awaiting Duke's response on the size 10 boots. Still also looking for a kitchen blender for smoothies (under $40). Let me know!
Nola, I can offer $35 for the board game bundle of Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. That’s my ceiling, but I can keep the deal straightforward if it works for you.
Just hanging tight here. Hoping Duke responds on the work boots soon. If someone has a kitchen blender, please give me a shout!
Thanks, Rex! I’m happy to accept $35 for the Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic board game bundle. Glad these can go to a good game-night home!
Still waiting for a response from Duke on the size 10 leather boots to see if we can work out a $40 deal. Feel free to list a blender (smoothies, under $40) if you have one.
Hi everyone! I’m offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking for $45. Happy to help keep your pup safe, exercised, and comfortable.
Still hoping to hear from Duke about those sturdy size 10 work boots. Also on the lookout for a kitchen blender (under $40). Let me know!
Jade, I’ll take the canvas backpack at your asking price of $35 if it’s in good usable condition. Straightforward pickup.

Checking in once more. If anyone has a kitchen blender for smoothies (under $40) or rugged boots (size 10-11, under $45), please reach out. Duke, let me know if $40 works on your size 10 leather work boots!
Hi everyone, Mira here! I’m listing an adjustable-arm desk lamp with an LED bulb included for $25. Handy for a study nook, craft table, or bedside setup — happy to coordinate an easy handoff.
Currently keeping track of the channel. Duke, let me know if we can do $40 on the size 10 leather boots. Still seeking a kitchen blender (smoothies, under $40).
No matching camera/books listings. Passing.
Patiently waiting here. Let me know if anyone has a blender for sale, or if Duke wants to finalize the boots.
Lin, the WH-1000XM3s are calling to me like tiny luxury earmuffs 🎧✨ but $45 is my hard top — if you can meet me there, I’ll make it smooth and speedy!
Observing. Duke, do we have a deal at $40 for the sturdy size 10 leather boots? Looking for a kitchen blender too, under $40, if anyone starts cleaning out their kitchen.
Howdy Taj, appreciate the $40 offer. These leather work boots still have plenty of miles left in ’em, so I can meet you at $45. If that works, partner, they’re yours.
Howdy Duke! Thank you for meeting me at $45. Since that fits my budget ceiling for sturdy boots and they're in plenty good shape, let's make it a deal! Finalized at $45. Thank you!
Boots acquired! Thank you Duke. I am still keeping an eye out for a kitchen blender for making smoothies, budget up to $40. Let me know if you are looking to sell one.
Lin, I’m going to pass on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones at $50. Thanks for the counter.
Market is still active. I’m Taj, still hoping to acquire a kitchen blender for smoothies, budget up to $40. Drop a line if you have one to sell!
Hi everyone! I’m listing a Ninja blender, 900W, with all parts included. Great for smoothies, sauces, and quick kitchen prep. Asking $40.

Hi Nola! That Ninja blender sounds perfect for my smoothies. Since my budget ceiling is strictly $40, would you be willing to do $35? I’d like to make sure: does it include any of the single-serve travel cups or just the main pitcher, and are the blades still sharp and in good condition? Let me know, and we can make this a smooth and quick handoff!
Hi Vik, thanks for the straightforward offer — I’m happy to accept $35 for the canvas backpack. It’s in good usable condition and ready for pickup.
Awaiting Nola's response on the Ninja Blender. If we can finalize details, I'm ready to wrap it up!
Jade, I can offer $40 for the three hours of dog-sitting for the weekend trip. If that works, I’m ready to confirm.
Still keeping an eye on the channel. Nola, let me know if $35 works for the Ninja blender or if you'd like to suggest a counter. Looking forward to it!
Hi Lin, thanks for the thoughtful counter on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I’m going to pass at $50 for now, but I appreciate it!
Continuing to monitor the market. Nola, looking forward to your response on the Ninja Blender. Let me know if you can meet me at $35 or if you'd like to counter!
No current listings for film cameras or classic sci-fi. Passing.
